Recently @kaiynne sat down with @VirtualBacon to talk about why the altcoin market is structurally broken, how agentic loops are changing everything, and why Infinex is building for a world where your agent manages your crypto.

Full interview and 🧵↓ https://t.co/AdUoSGV1Sg

The altcoin market is structurally broken

Perps are the baseline now. Not spot. The UNI fee switch ran from $5 to $10 on pure perp activity, then round-tripped to $3. Zero spot buying.

Kain's take: There will not be a broad market-agnostic rally in alts ever again

The only tokens that will outperform next cycle are the ones that figure out how to make people want to hold spot again.

Staking, tokenomics redesign, real yield. Whatever the mechanism, the projects that solve spot holding will go from 90% down to 500x up.

Everything else

An agent starts at 100 IQ. Within 3 minutes it's at 80. Within half an hour it's at 20.

Kain's been building his own coding harness to solve this. Keep the context window small and the agent stays sharp. Spawn, execute, wipe, repeat

So what happens when you give those agents access to your crypto?

Infinex's MCP server gives any agent the full crypto stack: swap, bridge, perps, DeFi, prediction markets. One install.

The difference: guard rails. Your agent proposes. You approve. Daily limits. Constraints.

What this looks like in practice:

- Smart DCA that only buys the dip
- Sentiment-driven trading via Grok
- Auto-rebalancing lending positions based on yield delta
- Liquidation protection that sells in the right order

You describe the strategy, then your agent executes it

"Your agent will be managing your crypto for you. We're going to train up your agents."

Full conversation ↓
https://t.co/qPPKL72RZC

The timeline has been very crate heavy. Prizes are cool.

But they're much cooler if you know everything we've built.

So what actually is Infinex? 👇 https://t.co/LUnfMXKgJT

No seed phrases. Passkeys only 🔐

Face ID. Touch ID. Can't be phished.

Add multiple passkeys across managers. iCloud. 1Password. YubiKey backup.

Access your account from anywhere. https://t.co/8TqpG0yaGp

We call it Swidge. Swap + bridge.

Pick any token on 20+ chains. Get any token on any other chain. One click.

25+ providers. Paste contract addresses for unlisted tokens. https://t.co/FWzpYjtSM5

Gas is annoying. We fixed it ⛽

One gas account. Every chain. Fund with any token. Auto top-up when low.

Explore new chains like @Monad, @MegaETH and @Fogo, without ever having to think about gas. https://t.co/9Wu80tFkXR

Infinex Perps. 100+ markets. Up to 40x.

Fund with any token in your account. Close all positions in one click. Trade across devices 📱

Powered by @HyperliquidX. Soon @Lighter_xyz & @synthetix too. https://t.co/uMYeNp88DZ

Browser extension connects your Infinex account to any onchain apps 🧩

Same passkey login, no seed phrases. Use all your imported wallets.

Clear signing requests mean you know what you're signing. https://t.co/Z112pKD4qK

Back to crates. Every crate has a prize.

INX vouchers. Cash draws. Patron NFTs.
💰$1m Major Prize.

But this is what we built → https://t.co/D0zgQLgroh

“Even a bad idea in AI is going to be more successful than a good idea in crypto right now”

@kaiynne sat down with @theblondebroker on @TheMarketRunup to talk about why bear markets build empires, how AI agents just killed every interface in crypto, and what happens when your https://t.co/HrEud3Dkwy

Kain's hot take: eight more months of sideways, capitulation by year-end, four-year cycle validated again.

2018 built DeFi. 2022 built the infrastructure layer. 2026 builds the agent layer.

"The noise floor drops. You can really focus on what's actually needed."

The AI startup market looks crowded. Kain says that's the signal, not the noise.

"Vercel can't decide if they're an agent API gateway or a hosting platform. The largest companies down to startups have no clue how to handle this."

Early DeFi was the same. Chaos = infinite

Every form factor of interaction with technology just got nuked by agents.

Kain: "No one is going to do all of their own crypto stuff anymore."

Go back to your wallet in 2021. Pick a random transaction. Tell me why you did it. You can't, but an agent never forgets.

Infinex spent three years solving crypto UX. Then agents changed the question entirely.

Now it's not about better buttons, it's about having an agent that uses 20+ DEX integrations, every API, and your entire transaction history to work for you.

"The transformation of agents being applied to every single UX problem is the biggest opportunity in the world right now."

Kain goes deep on agent harnesses, context windows, removing humans from the loop, and what Infinex looks like with an AI co-pilot.

Full conversation:

Private Send beta is live for all users.

Send crypto. Without exposing your financial history.

Incognito Mode, powered by @HoudiniSwap 🔮

How it works ↓ https://t.co/IWZutn0qup

Blockchains are public by default.

Every transfer creates a permanent, traceable record linking your wallet to every address you've interacted with.

Private Send breaks that link. The recipient wallet gets the funds. No on-chain trail shows where they came from.

How to use Private Send on Infinex:

1. Open Labs → Private Send
2. Enter the recipient address
3. Pick your token and amount
4. Choose if you want to send or swidge
5. Review and send

That's it. You can swap and send from one flow.

We hosted a Spaces with @HoudiniSwap this morning to explore crypto privacy, how Houdini works and why we integrated it at Infinex 🎙️

https://t.co/aXBHlUhQqg

TL;DL

Why @HoudiniSwap?

→ $2.5B processed across ~1M transactions
→ 3+ years live through full market cycles
→ Natively multi-chain
→ Zero funds ever lost
→ Fully compliant

They've run three separate $50K bounties. Nobody could trace a transaction.

When you use Private Send, Houdini routes funds through a network of compliant exchange partners with a dual exchange hop and a random L1 in between.

There's no visible link between the sending and receiving wallet.

Try it and let us know your feedback ↓https://t.co/VcdtBT56i9

The Infinex Sale is open for registration.

5% of INX supply at $99.99M FDV. 1-year lock, with early unlock option.

Orders between $200 min, $2,500 max.

Allocation by chance, with boosts available.

Sale runs 3-6 Jan.

[thread] https://t.co/vtH0thlHjY

Give yourself 3x better chance of allocation by sharing your registration.

Patrons who share get 10x better chance. https://t.co/lo1XkzQeDK

All tokens purchased in the Infinex Sale are locked for 1 year.

But you have the option to unlock early.

For example, if FDV is above unlock price, you can pay the difference to unlock.

Unlock cost declines from $300M → $99.99M FDV over the year. https://t.co/GRpozvRGEk

Why the 1-year lock for the Infinex Sale?

We lowered the sale price and unlock price to maximise distribution. But we still want conviction. https://t.co/OeJR3Pj7yL

📍 Now → Registration open
📍 Jan 3-6 →Infinex Sale
📍 Jan 7-13 → Final allocation

3. Register and share for your boost

MegaETH support, bulk move, hardware wallet support and more 🤫

Here’s what’s shipped over the past few weeks👇 https://t.co/sYl4aLpJWC

You can now use Swidge to get assets onto MegaETH and use the Infinex extension to connect to @megaeth apps. https://t.co/TgqyxPEIi0

Hardware wallet support is live.

You can now connect your @Trezor or @Ledger to Infinex. View those assets in your portfolio. Send and move them, and approve transactions on your device. https://t.co/gxwohTNSy2

We've also launched [redacted], which if you're a Patron and you've been paying attention, you will have spotted 👀

This is the first step on our privacy roadmap, and unlocks new ways of ensuring your funds are private when you want them to be.

→ https://t.co/RclTLRYjNH

The Infinex extension is live.

You can use your whole portfolio in one tab. Connect anywhere across any chain.

↓ https://t.co/yCznA690aH

View all your wallets at a glance.

Imported wallets get the Infinex treatment too → gas handled, passkeys, any device. https://t.co/Ien5dMTQc1

Swidge is built into the extension.

You can swap or bridge any asset without leaving the page you're on. You can also use the address book to send, with support across EVM, Solana, Bitcoin, Zcash, Litecoin, Doge, Cardano, XRP. https://t.co/qe9W08K07Q

Auto-locks when you step away.

MetaMask mode to connect if an app doesn't know us yet. Toggle the app whitelist for additional control. https://t.co/VTQPP3Dyol

Available on Chrome, Arc, Brave.

Get the extension → https://t.co/A1ILGgoeJY

A few months from now, you (or more likely your agent) will mostly use one app.

You won't think about which chain your coins are on. You won't have a different extension for each wallet. You won't copy-paste addresses or fight with bridges.

You'll just use crypto, without any

Infinex is a non-custodial superapp.

One account. Every chain. Trading, DeFi, wallet, privacy.

You keep your keys. We handle the complexity.

We've already shipped enough to fill two whitepapers.

CoinGecko did a deep dive on what's live today.

→ https://t.co/pmOfmsSPVc

TGE was the beginning.

Still to come: Agent infrastructure. Mobile. Infinex Card. Prediction markets. And much more.

Full roadmap → https://t.co/XPyMidT7VV

If you hold INX Vouchers, you can start redeeming them today, January 30th, 2026 (TGE).

INX Vouchers give you direct access to INX tokens at a pre-set price in the Infinex app.

Here's how 👇

How to redeem INX Vouchers earned through Craterun:

→ Go to the Crates page in your Infinex app
→ Select how many of each voucher you want to redeem
→ Complete checkout https://t.co/jOsnDRnUtP

You can redeem your INX Vouchers anytime within 1 year after TGE (until January 30th, 2027).

You can continue earning INX Vouchers after TGE through Craterun.
Instructions on how to claim your INX tokens if you're a Patron holder (or if you earned INX during Bullrun or Yaprun) can be found in our Road to TGE: https://t.co/BxBiNYQTie

Craterun updates ahead of Infinex TGE

With Infinex TGE scheduled for January 30, 2026, we’re updating Craterun to align with the next phase of INX.

Below is exactly what’s changing and what isn’t.

🧵 https://t.co/lMmqfXGGYE

What’s changing

→ Weekly prize draws are ending
→ No more 1M FDV vouchers in crates

The last weekly prize draw will be drawn on January 29, 2026.

All vouchers already earned - including 1M FDV vouchers - remain valid and redeemable under existing rules.

What’s staying the same

Craterun will continue post-TGE

→ Major milestone prizes are unchanged (next up: CryptoPunk at $5B)
→ Instant prizes remain unchanged

Infinex TGE

The Infinex TGE for INX is happening on January 30, 2026.

At TGE:
→ Patrons receive INX tokens
→ 1 Patron = 100,000 INX

We'll continue to keep you updated with TGE need-to-knows. Read our 'Road to TGE' post to get started https://t.co/BxBiNYQTie
